positive: Minimalist celestial landscape illustration, featuring a majestic geometric crescent moon intertwined with stylized constellations and nebula clouds. The color palette should be deep indigo, shimmering sapphire blue, and metallic gold accents, providing a high contrast against a deep void background. The style is clean, vector-inspired, and elegant, suitable for screen printing. Use negative space effectively, maintaining a central, symmetrical composition. The moon and star designs should have sharp, clean silhouettes. Include delicate, glowing stardust particle trails for added detail, emphasizing cosmic wonder and tranquility. Perfect for apparel print, isolated on a transparent or solid dark background.
